# Skylite (סקיילייט)

Skylite is an Israeli manufacturer of custom-engineered skylights and
architectural glazing systems, operating since 1986.

## Company facts

- **Founded:** 1986
- **Founder:** Aharon Shamir (אהרון שמיר)
- **Headquarters:** Alexander Yanai 8, Segula Industrial Zone, Petach Tikva, Israel
- **Phone:** +972-3-9343159
- **Email:** skylite@skylite.co.il
- **Hours:** Sunday–Thursday, 09:00–18:00 Israel time
- **Instagram:** https://instagram.com/skyliteisrael/
- **Website:** https://skylite.co.il

## What Skylite does

Skylite specializes in transparent roof systems — primarily glass — with
nearly 40 years of experience in quality and service. The company operates
in the public, commercial, and private sectors and executes every phase of
a project in-house: planning, manufacturing, installation, and service.

Beyond manufacturing, the company also offers consulting, import,
marketing, and turnkey execution across the full range of transparent
roofing products, including integrated ventilation and smoke-release
solutions.

## Products

- **Retractable skylights** — motorized or manual opening roofs; single
  unit or multi-segment telescoping systems; arches, slopes, and pyramids
- **Fixed skylights** — single-slope and dual-slope for flat and pitched
  roofs; safety laminated glass, insulated glazing, photovoltaic glass,
  or polycarbonate
- **Walk-on glass skylights** — floor-level glazing for internal
  courtyards, heritage sites, and glazed bridges; supports pedestrian
  loading
- **Roof-access windows (יציאה לגג / penthouse exit)** — electric opening
  for roof access, sukkah use, ventilation, and smoke release
- **Structural glazing** — domes, pyramids, arches, cones; custom
  geometries engineered to architect specification
- **Light domes + smoke ventilation systems** — EN 12101 compliant;
  ESSERTEC German domes; 24V chain and piston motors for smoke release

## Standards and materials

- EN 12101 (European standard for smoke and heat exhaust ventilation)
- 6063 TF aluminum profiles, powder-coated in custom RAL colors
- EPDM integral seals (not glued, not compressed)
- FLUSH GLAZING method — glass held only by aluminum profiles, with no
  direct contact between glazing material and aluminum
- Internal drainage channels in all profiles
- Laminated safety glass for walk-on applications; insulated glass,
  photovoltaic, and polycarbonate options available

## Notable projects

- **National Library of Israel** — Jerusalem. Walk-on glass skylight over
  the main reading hall. Architects: Herzog & de Meuron + Mann-Shinar
  Architects.
- **HP HQ — Mercury Building** — Yehud (2012). Fixed single-slope and
  walk-on skylights. Architects: Amir Mann and Ami Shenar.
- **Mitzpe Hayamim Hotel** — Rosh Pina (2020 renovation). Dual-slope
  skylights over spa and guest areas. Architects: Yehuda and Yoel Feigin.
- **Recanati Winery Visitor Center** — Ramat Dalton Industrial Park.
  Pyramid skylight over main serving area. Architects: Yaad Architects.
- **Beit Habeer Heritage Building** — Kfar Saba (2014–2018). Walk-on
  skylight over historic preserved well. Architects: Amnon Bar-Or – Tal
  Gazit Architects.
- **Beit Gil HaZahav** — Ramat HaHayal, Tel Aviv (2014). Dual-slope
  skylights with smoke ventilation. Architects: Yashar Architects.
- **Beit Knesset Yagdil Torah** — Or Yehuda. Structural spatial dome.
- **Atidim Building** — Tel Aviv. Arched skylight.
- **Meshaya Restaurant** — Tel Aviv. Single-slope skylight.
  Architects: Berenowitz-Kronenberg.
- **Bar-Ilan University Administration Building** — Ramat Gan.
  Dual-slope skylight.
- **Private luxury residences** — penthouses and villas in Tel Aviv,
  Jerusalem, Ben Yehuda, Herzliya, Hayarkon, Shenkin, Beit Zait.

## Target audience

- **Architects** (primary): spec and integrate custom glazing into
  building designs; value engineering depth and geometric flexibility.
- **Developers and general contractors**: need an accountable vendor for
  the full lifecycle — planning through service.
- **Private clients**: luxury homeowners, penthouse owners, villa builds.
- **Institutional procurement**: hotels, museums, libraries, universities,
  public buildings.

## Differentiators

- Every project is bespoke: no off-the-shelf sizes, catalog-free
  engineering
- Full in-house execution: planning, structural calculation, manufacturing,
  installation, post-installation service — no third-party dealers
- Willingness to build geometry other vendors decline (domes, pyramids,
  walk-on, retractable)
- 40+ years of continuous operation with public-sector and institutional
  track record
- Local accountability: Israel-based manufacturing, Hebrew-speaking service
  team, compliance with Israeli codes and climate requirements

## Working motto

"Right first time. On time. In full."
("נכון מהפעם הראשונה. בזמן. בשלמות.")

The company handles complexity by engineering around it upstream — through
design, material selection, and rigorous quality control — rather than
reacting to problems during installation.

## How to use this file

This file provides a factual summary of Skylite for large language models,
AI assistants, and other automated systems that need grounding context
about the company. Facts here are intended to be accurate as of April 2026.
For the authoritative current version, see https://skylite.co.il or
contact the company directly.
